certificate_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the SSL certificate used for the endpoint.

database_name.description: The name of the database to be used by the endpoint.

elasticsearch_settings.description: Settings specific to Elasticsearch endpoint configuration.

endpoint_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DMS endpoint.

endpoint_type.description: The type of the endpoint, either source or target.

engine_name.description: The database engine to use for the endpoint.

extra_connection_attributes.description: Additional connection attributes for the endpoint.

id.description: The ID of the DMS endpoint.

kafka_settings.description: Settings specific to Kafka endpoint configuration.

kinesis_settings.description: Settings specific to Kinesis endpoint configuration.

kms_key_arn.description: The ARN of the KMS key used for encryption.

mongodb_settings.description: Settings specific to MongoDB endpoint configuration.

password.description: The password to use for connecting to the endpoint.

port.description: The port used by the database engine.

postgres_settings.description: Settings specific to PostgreSQL endpoint configuration.

redis_settings.description: Settings specific to Redis endpoint configuration.

redshift_settings.description: Settings specific to Redshift endpoint configuration.

s3_settings.description: Settings specific to S3 endpoint configuration.

secrets_manager_access_role_arn.description: The ARN of the role for accessing Secrets Manager.

secrets_manager_arn.description: The ARN of the Secrets Manager secret.

server_name.description: The name of the server where the endpoint is located.

service_access_role.description: The role that allows access to the service.

ssl_mode.description: The SSL mode for the connection.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the endpoint.

username.description: The username for connecting to the endpoint.
